title: NHKs Evangelion mega poll results 2020
wikitext:
[]: NHK's Evangelion mega poll results (2020)             Quote Post by Joseki » Sat May 16, 2020 11:40 am Voting on NHK's website ran from March 27 to April 29. The poll respondents were 57.5% male and 42.5% female. 31.1% of respondents were aged 19 or under, 24.2% were in their 20s, 21.9% were in their 30s, 14.8% were in their 40s, 7.1% were in their 50s, and 0.9% were in their 60s.

[]: Re: NHK Evangelion popularity survey results             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat May 16, 2020 5:14 pm I had no idea Evangelion Mark 6 had such a following. The second favorite Eva after Unit 01. Wild.

[]: Re: NHK Evangelion popularity survey results             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Sat May 16, 2020 5:34 pm Zero surprises here. Even down to age and gender distribution, wow. Then again, it's pretty obvious that Eva is *not* a cool underground 90s show in Japan at all.

[]: Re: NHK Evangelion popularity survey results             Quote Post by girlifyoudidnt » Sat May 16, 2020 5:36 pm Rest of the top 30 quotes. 9. Bathing is the laundry of life. (Misato) 11. Come now, the promised time has come, Ikari Shinji-kun. This time, I'll be sure to bring you happiness. (Kaworu) 12. Father! I'm the pilot of Evangelion Unit-01, Shinji Ikari! (Shinji) 13. Next time, service, service~ (Misato) 14. Go for it, Shinji-kun! Don't do this for someone else! Do this for your own desires! (Misato) 15. I was born to meet you. (Kaworu) 16. Shinji-kun, I can do nothing but water here. But for you, I bet there is the thing which YOU can do and only you can do. Nobody forces you. Think by yourself and decide by yourself what you should do now. Well, I wish you no regret. (Kaji) 17. I mustn't run away I mustn't run away I mustn't run away 18. Shit!! Even without the cable... I still have 12,000 plates of special armor... and my AT Field! I can't lose! Not against you!! (Asuka) 19. Shinji-kun, you just need to find peace and a place to call your own. Fate will surely guide you. Don't look at me like that. We'll meet again, Shinji-kun. (Kaworu) 20. I don't know, but... I feel warm around Ikari-kun. I want to feel warm towards him, as well. I think I want to feel warm about him getting along with Commander Ikari. (Rei) 21. I may have been born to meet you (Kaworu) 22. Congratulations 23. I don't care what happens to me. I don't care what happens to the world. But at least Ayanami... At least I will save Ayanami! (Shinji) 24. I love you. (Kaworu) 25. Garlic ramen without pork (Rei) 26. A.T. Field at maximum! Even if Ikari-kun won't pilot Eva, it's alright! Therefore... (Rei) 27. Stop talking like a spoiled brat! You're still alive, aren't you? So, do all you can to keep yourself alive, and then die afterwards! (Misato) 28. Are you stupid?! Why were you unaware of this crucial situation? (Asuka) 29. I'll kill you... Kill... kill... kill you... Kill... I'll kill you... I'll kill you all... (Asuka) 30. However, no sin is beyond redemption. There is always hope. Always. (Kaworu) Plus a message from Asuka's VA, Yuko Miyamura. tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]: Re: NHK Evangelion popularity survey results             Quote Post by robersora » Sat May 16, 2020 5:50 pm So the Angel Numbering is from NTE, right? 12th Angel was the thing they found down in Terminal Dogma in Q, right? But what was 11th? Interesting, also, that Asuka is now 1st place, specifically NTE Asuka... But might this point to a cultural shift in Otakudom in the last 25 years, or is the audience of Eva just different? Also, Kaworu not being first place is a travesty I disavow, but he got 2nd place twice, so... I'll take what I get, lmao. (Japanese Fujoshi, I'm disappointed #snubbed) Favorite dialogue: Which translation should we use? I'm not familiar enough with the English translation either way, so here's my (very loose) takes on some lines... #9 is "A bath drives off worries and sorrows" // "There is nothing like a bath to kick back and relax" I have no idea when this was said, but I guess it's from Misato? 10位 「あんたバカぁ？ 決まってるじゃない 2号機で あれをやっつけんのよ」 "Are you an idiot? Of course I'm gonna finish it off with Unit-02!" 11位 「さあ約束の時だ 碇シンジくん 今度こそ君だけは幸せにしてみせるよ」 Now the promised time has come, Ikari Shinji, this time for sure I will bring you your happiness. (Kaworu lines are tricky af, it's very poetic, in a way... Too close and it sounds clumsy af, stray too far and it loses some meaning) 12位 「父さんっ！ 僕はっ エヴァンゲリオン初号機パイロット 碇シンジです！」 "Father! The pilot of Evangelion Unit 01 is me, Ikari Shinji!" 13位 「さぁて この次も サービスサービスぅ！」 Is Misato's line at the next Episode previews, lmao. Saabisu Saabisu! 14位 「いきなさい！ シンジくん 誰かのためじゃない！ あなた自身の願いのために！」 "Go for it! Don't do it for someone else! Do it for your own sake!" (my translation) I remember this line being the pivotal line of Misato (being so beautifully mirrored in 3.33), so I looked up the OG English translation. And GOD DAMN is the English dub bad! They talk so unnatural and slowly... No wonder Khara couldn't bare looking at this travesty of a localization any longer... Sad that Dan Kanemitsu's translations come with it's own set of problems tho... I'm happy to be German, lmao. They went with "You can do it Shinji! Do it for yourself! Do it because this is what you want!" 15位 「楽しいよ 僕は君と会うために生まれてきたんだね」 "I'm glad - Like I was born to meet you" (I've added the like, cuz I don't know how to insert the slight uncertainty otherwise) Oh I was too slow, lol

[]: Re: NHK Evangelion popularity survey results             Quote Post by Justacrazyguy » Sat May 16, 2020 6:45 pm I can't believe Rei is in third place. My disgust is infinite.

[]: Re: NHK Evangelion popularity survey results             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sat May 16, 2020 7:16 pm Very happy to see Japan has come to their senses and realize that Asuka and Karwou are far superior to that blue haired doll. Once they realize Misato is also superior, justice will prevail. I also find it greatly amusing that my girl Sakura (with somewhere around 10 minutes screen time) is apparently more popular than Kensuke and Hyuga. Poor nerds.... And I honestly don't know who Shrio is, but he's also more popular.

[]: Re: NHK Evangelion popularity survey results             Quote Post by robersora » Sat May 16, 2020 7:21 pm ^ lmao I didn't even notice that. I mistook him for Hideki Tama, the cute Wunder technician, lol, but actually he's the executive of a private company who gives a demonstration of the ill-fated Jet Alone project seen in Episode 07.

[]: Re: NHK Evangelion popularity survey results             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sat May 16, 2020 10:30 pm Glad the best character ever created won.

[]: Re: NHK Evangelion popularity survey results             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat May 16, 2020 11:07 pm robersora wrote: 12th Angel was the thing they found down in Terminal Dogma in Q, right? But what was 11th?

[]: Re: NHK Evangelion popularity survey results             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Sat May 16, 2020 11:45 pm It's worth noticing that these polls also reflect the current trends. In the 90s Rei would win no doubt, then Asuka slowly began to take the toll) top place during the 00s. Then Rei got popularity back after 2.0 in 2009 and lost a lot of prominence again after 3.0. Kaworu is even more specific because he faded somewhat (relative to other characters) and would usually be on 4th place (after Shinji) or sometimes even 5th after Misato. After 3.0 he exploded in popularity again and jumped to 2nd place. I remember Anno (or was it Tsurumaki?) said somewhere that Rei had simply lost her mystery over time. I must say I thought Mari might be a bit lower, though... I'm very interested to see how the next movie will affect future results.

[]: Re: NHK Evangelion popularity survey results             Quote Post by girlifyoudidnt » Sun May 17, 2020 4:25 am In the Evangelion Forever book, there's the results of a character poll taken by a radio program that garnered 46,307 votes. It was done a month after EoE released in theaters, and results weren't too different from now. 1. Asuka 2. Kaworu 3. Shinji 4. Misato 5. Rei 6. Maya 7. Kaji 8. Gendo 9. Ritsuko 10. Pen Pen tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]: Re: NHK Evangelion popularity survey results             Quote Post by robersora » Sun May 17, 2020 10:34 am huh, I guess Rei being so popular was just a meme then

[]: Re: NHK Evangelion popularity survey results             Quote Post by Derantor » Sun May 17, 2020 11:43 am Certainly not. Otherwise, the best-girl-wars wouldn't have raged so long and so bitterly. EoE just gave Asuka much more cool stuff to do than it gave Rei, which might have influenced the polls - and my guess is that GNR and all that crazy stuff was not really Waifu material for her general following. That Asuka would win out in the end was a foregone conclusion, though. Chad Furor Teutonicus beats Virgin Yamato Nadeshiko every time.

[]: Re: NHK Evangelion popularity survey results             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Sun May 17, 2020 1:12 pm Yes, there are plenty of other, and larger, polls representing Rei's popularity at the time. She *was* the Premium Girl after all. We can't just forget her gargantuan popularity and influence over the years. Gee, Anno himself directly points this out with Rei literally saying she's doing better than Asuka in these polls in After The End .

[]: Re: NHK Evangelion popularity survey results             Quote Post by Rei IV » Sun May 17, 2020 7:13 pm Reichu wrote: There's no information whatsoever. It's like if "Evangelion Mark.07" was an option on the poll and people actually voted for it. My favorite character was never even remotely popular *as a character*, so I don't get any grumbling rights, I suppose. It's so nice, not even having a voice that matters on the great stage of "moronic fan disputes". Also, insert a bitter rant here about how contests of popularity are insipid, and down with the normies, and etc. etc.

[]: Re: NHK Evangelion popularity survey results             Quote Post by Joseki » Tue May 19, 2020 5:17 am Voting on NHK's website ran from March 27 to April 29. The poll respondents were 57.5% male and 42.5% female. 31.1% of respondents were aged 19 or under, 24.2% were in their 20s, 21.9% were in their 30s, 14.8% were in their 40s, 7.1% were in their 50s, and 0.9% were in their 60s. https://www.animenewsnetwork.com/intere ... ll/.159641 I also fixed the OP meanwhile, so that anime historian of the future can better read the data. Thanks for the better translations everyone! robersora wrote: So the Angel Numbering is from NTE, right? 12th Angel was the thing they found down in Terminal Dogma in Q, right? But what was 11th?

[]: Re: NHK's Evangelion mega poll results (2020)             Quote Post by girlifyoudidnt » Thu May 21, 2020 5:01 pm Found some more voter data from the poll. Asuka - 62.5% male, 37.5% female voters - #1 voter group aged 19 and under, #2 group in their 20s, #3 group in their 30s https://twitter.com/kiyokageh/status/12 ... 9080605697 Kaworu - 25.7% male, 74.3% female voters - #1 voter group aged 19 and under, #2 group in their 20s, #3 group in their 30s https://twitter.com/ss_____68/status/12 ... 8628624385 Shinji - 44.8% male, 55.2% female voters - #1 voter group aged 19 and under, #2 group in their 20s, #3 group in their 30s https://twitter.com/sctm_27/status/1261680045522743296 Will try and see if I can find Rei's data later. The poll got 109,577 votes total, the least of any of the NHK anime polls so far, but it also had less days for voting than all of the others.

[]: Re: NHK's Evangelion mega poll results (2020)             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Thu May 21, 2020 5:55 pm Hm. For comparison's sake, the Eva Store poll from last year, which followed this one's patterns somewhat, probably got less than 5 thousand votes: https://www.animenewsnetwork.com/intere ... ts/.143034

[]: Re: NHK's Evangelion mega poll results (2020)             Quote Post by girlifyoudidnt » Fri Jul 10, 2020 6:08 pm Found the full voter data stats, finally. SPOILER: Show
